query: SELECT template_type, template_name, message FROM sms_templates WHERE template_type IN ('admin_weekly_report', 'catering_quote_request', 'event_inquiry_response', 'newsletter_confirmation');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2acBjedGBUZUvzs.4f77da611348 --database 6g8xxhsNMKiXF83cS8YGfP --execute SELECT template_type, template_name, message FROM sms_templates WHERE template_type IN ('admin_weekly_report', 'catering_quote_request', 'event_inquiry_response', 'newsletter_confirmation');

rows.message: 📊 Weekly Report: {{totalOrders}} orders, £{{totalRevenue}} revenue. Top item: {{topItem}}. Full report sent to email.
Hi {{customerName}}! We received your catering quote request for {{cateringType}} on {{eventDate}} ({{guestCount}} guests). We'll send you a detailed quote via email within 24 hours!
Hi {{customerName}}! Regarding your {{eventType}} inquiry at Boomiis: {{responseMessage}}. Check your email for full details.
Hi {{customerName}}! You're now subscribed to Boomiis Restaurant newsletter ({{email}}). Stay tuned for exclusive offers!

stdout:
template_type	template_name	message
admin_weekly_report	Admin: Weekly Sales Report	📊 Weekly Report: {{totalOrders}} orders, £{{totalRevenue}} revenue. Top item: {{topItem}}. Full report sent to email.
catering_quote_request	Catering Quote Request Received	Hi {{customerName}}! We received your catering quote request for {{cateringType}} on {{eventDate}} ({{guestCount}} guests). We'll send you a detailed quote via email within 24 hours!
event_inquiry_response	Event Inquiry Response	Hi {{customerName}}! Regarding your {{eventType}} inquiry at Boomiis: {{responseMessage}}. Check your email for full details.
newsletter_confirmation	Newsletter Subscription Confirmed	Hi {{customerName}}! You're now subscribed to Boomiis Restaurant newsletter ({{email}}). Stay tuned for exclusive offers!
